name: Orange-Onion Salad with Pomegranate Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Pomegranate Dressing according to the separate recipe.
2. Using a sharp knife, carefully remove the peel of the oranges, ensuring all bitter white pith is removed as well. Cut the oranges and onion into 1/4-inch-thick slices. Separate the onion slices into rings.
3. On a large platter, arrange the chicory leaves. Layer half of the orange slices and half of the onion rings on top. Repeat with the remaining orange and onion slices. Sprinkle the pomegranate seeds over the top. Serve immediately with the Pomegranate Dressing.
